violations.text: The cold rail was observed with water pooling at the bottom of the unit. Equipment components such as doors, seals, hinges, fasteners, and kick plates shall be kept intact, tight, and adjusted in accordance with manufacturer's specifications. New Violation. Correct By: 11/26/2025
The ceiling vent in the back ware-washing area has an accumulation of dust. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 11/26/2025
The gasket of the cold draws under the fryolator was not in good repair (frayed). PIC requested a maintenance visit to service/repair/replace gaskets. New Violation. Correct By: 05/03/2023
